© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc. I www.ProductLaunchFormula.com
Okay, so this is just the skeleton script for your sales video. Now, I'm not going to
go into great detail and read everything here, because you can read it just as well as I can,
and it'd be a really boring video, and I went through a lot of this stuff in the Quickstart
Guide.
Basically, want to open with a big promise or a hook. You know, "What if there
was," this thing "that could completely change your life? Well, I've got it here." Then, I
like to go right to authority right in the very beginning. If you really watch what I do and
the videos I put out, I'm sprinkling in authority nonstop all the way through. Because
authority is what gets people to listen to you. It makes a huge difference when you build
that authority in.
Then you want to show them what the opportunity is. You want to show them
what the opportunity is. You again want to hit authority. One of the things I want to
mention about the skeleton script is a lot of these things you can move them around, or
you can hit them more than once, or revisit them more than once.
And then, proof and testimonials. Really powerful. To whatever level that you
have got them, super, super powerful.
You want to foreshadow urgency somewhere fairly early on.
You want to make your crushing offer. You got to remember as I talked about
earlier in the Quickstart Guide, the offer in a bigger picture, is the offer is the
transformation. You're offering them a transformation. You're offering them to change
their lives. That's really what the offer it.
When you're making the offer, that's what you lead with, but then as you get
further down in your sales video, at some point you actually have to talk about what
people are actually going to get because there are some people that are really interested
in that, and it makes a difference whether it's a live seminar that they travel to, or it's an
online course. Whether it's a widget this a service, or it's a webinar, or whatever, it makes
a difference. So, the idea is in the bulk of your sales video, you're actually going to talk
about the bigger picture. The transformation. The offer as it relates to how their life is
going to change, but then as you get further down, that's when you actually start talking
about the stuff.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

© 2017 Internet Alchemy, Inc. I www.ProductLaunchFormula.com
Then you want to cover bonuses and then you reveal your price. Down here these
things can, these can shift around a little bit. I like to reveal price and then I often will go
right to risk reversal, your guarantee. Then the call to action, which is telling them
exactly what to do. Of course, you got to hit your urgency in here as well. Your scarcity.
Then, if up here you hit your urgency, then you have your call to action and then you
maybe give a surprise bonus, you do your risk reversal.
You have now used up enough time where you can go back and you can re-close,
and this time you hit the scarcity pretty full on. Then, you can have a PS with social
proof. If you do that, you always do want to end with a call to action with another close.
Another call to action to get them to click the button. You always want to end with some
type of a call to action.
No matter what you do, whether you add a bonus at the end or you talk about
scarcity at the end, you revisit the guarantee and the risk-reversal, whatever, but then at
the end, it's, "Go ahead and click the button and join me." "Go ahead and click the button
and jump on board with ..." "Everyone else has already bought." "Go ahead and click the
button and I can't wait to see you on the other side." Whatever it is, you always want to
end with that call to action.
